page.title: User Management
page.description: View system users, manage activation status and reset passwords.

noPermission.title: Access Denied
noPermission.description: Only administrators can access the user management page.

accountList.title: Account List
accountList.description: Only administrators can change user status or reset passwords.

createDialog.title: Add User
createDialog.passwordHint: A random password is generated by default, you can modify it before creating.

resetDialog.title: Reset Password
resetDialog.passwordHint: A random password is generated by default, you can modify it before confirming.

deleteDialog.title: Confirm Delete User
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete user {{username}}? This will delete all user data, including:

packageDialog.title: Manage Package
packageDialog.expireDateHint: After expiration, all inbound configurations will be removed and package unbound automatically
packageDialog.monthlyResetDayHint: Traffic will be reset on this day each month (1-31)
packageDialog.monthlyResetDayWarning: . Note: February only has 28/29 days, reset will occur on the last day of the month

toast.packageWarning: Package bound, but some node configurations failed: {{warnings}}
